authorization_decision.result: authorize a future path-limited source implementation lane after review, without editing source in G2.228

future_expected_implementation_shape: Preserve get_prewarming_strategy as the default provider.

Replace route-body direct get_prewarming_strategy() calls with the injected strategy object.
Preserve current route paths, auth dependencies, response shapes, OpenAPI exposure, and CachePrewarmingStrategy behavior.

route path, OpenAPI exposure, response model, auth, SQL, PM2, frontend, or docs/api changes
